## sidebar-05

A sidebar with collapsible submenus.

visual_summary: A configurable sidebar component with collapsible submenus, ideal for navigation in applications with a lot of features. It's perfect for organizing content and providing users with a clear overview of their options. Use this component to add a professional touch to your product's UI.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sidebar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-05
Description: A configurable sidebar component with collapsible submenus, ideal for navigation in applications with a lot of features. It's perfect for organizing content and providing users with a clear overview of their options. Use this component to add a professional touch to your product's UI.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, material
Interactions: e.g. hover, collapsed/expanded
Tags: sidebar, navigation, collapsible

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
